name: Sari of the Silverwing Axe
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>銀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>翼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＡＸＥ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アクス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－サリー
desc: (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; equip this card from your hand or field to it. It gains 100 ATK/DEF. You can only use this effect of "Sari of the Silverwing Axe" once per turn.
mnst_eff: (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; equip this card from your hand or field to it. It gains 100 ATK/DEF. You can only use this effect of "Sari of the Silverwing Axe" once per turn.
